revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox royal styles/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Infobox royal styles/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox royal styles/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Infobox royal styles/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "#redirect[[en:Template" to "#redirect[[:en:Template"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:Infobox royal styles/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Infobox royal styles/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: sync with enwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} == See also == * [{{fullurl:index.php|title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere&target=Template%3A{{urlencode:{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}&namespace=0}} List of articles] this template ;Additional information on styles * [[Royal Highness|HRH]] * [[Royal and noble styles]] * [[Style (form of address)]] ;Core template * [[Template:Infobox manner of address]] ;Similar templates * [[Template:Infobox British royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox French royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles]] {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Royal Styles}} [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates]] [[Category:Styles infobox templates]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox manner of address]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} == See also == * [{{fullurl:index.php|title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere&target=Template%3A{{urlencode:{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}&namespace=0}} List of articles] this template ;Additional information on styles * [[Royal Highness|HRH]] * [[Royal and noble styles]] * [[Style (form of address)]] ;Core template * [[Template:Infobox manner of address]] ;Similar templates * [[Template:Infobox British royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox French royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles]] {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Royal Styles}} [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates]] [[Category:Styles infobox templates]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox manner of address]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} == See also == * [{{fullurl:index.php|title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere&target=Template%3A{{urlencode:{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}&namespace=0}} List of articles] this template ;Additional information on styles * [[Royal Highness|HRH]] * [[Royal and noble styles]] * [[Style (form of address)]] ;Core template * [[Template:Infobox manner of address]] ;Similar templates * [[Template:Infobox British royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox French royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles]] {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Royal Styles}} [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates]] [[Category:Styles infobox templates]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox manner of address]] }}

| alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[:en:Pedro II of Brazil|Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} == See also == * [{{fullurl:index.php|title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere&target=Template%3A{{urlencode:{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}&namespace=0}} List of articles] this template ;Additional information on styles * [[:en:Royal Highness|HRH]] * [[:en:Royal and noble styles|Royal and noble styles]] * [[Style (form of address)]] ;Core template * [[Template:Infobox manner of address]] ;Similar templates * [[:en:Template:Infobox British royalty styles|Template:Infobox British royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles|Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox French royalty styles|Template:Infobox French royalty styles]] * [[Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles]] {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Royal Styles}} [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates]] [[Category:Styles infobox templates]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox manner of address]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[:en:Pedro II of Brazil|Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} == See also == * [{{fullurl:index.php|title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere&target=Template%3A{{urlencode:{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}&namespace=0}} List of articles] this template ;Additional information on styles * [[:en:Royal Highness|HRH]] * [[:en:Royal and noble styles|Royal and noble styles]] * [[Style (form of address)]] ;Core template * [[Template:Infobox manner of address]] ;Similar templates * [[:en:Template:Infobox British royalty styles|Template:Infobox British royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles|Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox French royalty styles|Template:Infobox French royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles|Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles]] {{Sandbox other|| {{DEFAULTSORT:Royal Styles}} [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates]] [[Category:Styles infobox templates]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox manner of address]] }}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{DEFAULTSORT:" to "{{citation needed|"
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[:en:Pedro II of Brazil|Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} == See also == * [{{fullurl:index.php|title=Special%3AWhatLinksHere&target=Template%3A{{urlencode:{{BASEPAGENAME}}}}&namespace=0}} List of articles] this template ;Additional information on styles * [[:en:Royal Highness|HRH]] * [[:en:Royal and noble styles|Royal and noble styles]] * [[Style (form of address)]] ;Core template * [[Template:Infobox manner of address]] ;Similar templates * [[:en:Template:Infobox British royalty styles|Template:Infobox British royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles|Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox French royalty styles|Template:Infobox French royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles|Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Royal Styles}} [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates]] [[Category:Styles infobox templates]] [[Category:Templates calling Infobox manner of address]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[:en:Pedro II of Brazil|Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece British royalty styles|Template:Infobox British royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles|Template:Infobox Dutch royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox French royalty styles|Template:Infobox French royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles|Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Royal Styles}} revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[:en:Pedro II of Brazil|Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | revision.comment: Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23462003564|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} [[:en:Pedro II of Brazil|Pedro II of Brazil]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the Empire of Brazil (1853-1889).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[Imperial Majesty (style)|His Imperial Majesty]] | spoken = Your Imperial Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Greece=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[Alexander of Greece (king)]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = King Alexander I of the Hellenes | image = Royal Arms of Greece (1863-1936).svg | image_size = 60px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|His Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} == See also == * styles|Template:Infobox French royalty styles]] * [[:en:Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles|Template:Infobox Portuguese royalty styles]] {{Sandbox other|| {{citation needed|Royal Styles}} }} with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{Wraps infobox|Infobox manner of address}} == Usage == ===Blank template=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = | image = | image_size = | reference = | spoken = | alternative = }} ===Parameters=== * '''name''' or '''royal name''' : Name which appears at top of infobox * '''image''' : (optional) [[:en:Coat of arms|Coat of arms]] image, should be in format Imagefilename.png * '''image_size''' : (optional) Image size, generally between 50-100px * '''reference''' or '''dipstyle''' : [[Style (form of address)|Reference style]] (originally labeled: Diplomatic style) * '''spoken''' or '''offstyle''' : Spoken style (originally labeled: Official spoken style) * '''alternative''' or '''altstyle''' : Alternative style (originally labeled: Alternative spoken style) == Examples == ===Commonwealth Realms=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} [[:en:Elizabeth II|Elizabeth II]] {{Infobox royal styles | name = Queen Elizabeth II | image = Personal flag of Queen Elizabeth II.svg | image_size = 75px | reference = [[:en:Majesty|Her Majesty]] | spoken = Your Majesty }} {{clear}} ===Brazil=== {{Infobox royal styles | name = Pedro II, Emperor of Brazil | image = Coat of Arms of the
